reviews.author: Mithun Gupt
reviews.review_body: It's a good childerns teach centre for future

reviews.author: Lavinika Dhoundiyal
reviews.review_body: Shigally Hill International Academy is one of the best boarding school in Dehradun.Its scenic campus amongst greenery attracts girls around the vicinity to study in this school.The highly qualified and dedicated educators, school Principal,advisors, residential staff and diverse student body create a modern learning experience for the students in a safe and stimulating campus.One of the best things about Shigally is that the school takes a holistic approach towards learning. The school develops students academic and personal growth through hands on learning opportunities and intercultural experiences.

reviews.author: Kanchan Bisht
reviews.review_body:
Being a part of Shigally Hill International Academy Girl’s Residential School, I strongly recommend it to all those looking for Residential School in Uttrakhand for their girl child. Their curriculum is excellent with a good balance of academics, co-curricular activities and discipline. The teachers and other staff are very helpful and take care of children as their own, because of which the child feels at home.The appropriate place for study. Creative thoughts start to grow from schools, though it depends on the environment. This beautiful natural environment is appropriate to develop a simple brain to a creative one. Even only nature could produce real human beings which is really lacking in today's life.
Our Indian history says about Vedic age, at that time students used to go to Ashrama for appropriate study living in nature.Definitely a good school for girls.

reviews.author: Jaya Bhatt
reviews.review_body: The school's emphasis on values and character development.The school's facilities and resources are top-notch, providing a safe and stimulating environment for learning and growth.I appreciate the school's focus on [specific area, e.g., STEM, arts, or special needs support]. It's clear they're committed to providing a well-rounded education.It's a great place for children to learn, grow, and thrive!

reviews.author: Suprita M
reviews.review_body: Shigally Hill International Academy has been an exceptional institution for my child's educational journey. The dedicated teachers, supportive staff, and inclusive environment have fostered a love for learning and growth. The curriculum is well-rounded, and the extracurricular activities have helped develop valuable skills. Communication with parents is regular and transparent. I highly recommend to anyone seeking a nurturing and challenging environment for their child."

reviews.author: Urmila UrmilaJi
reviews.review_body: It is very bad school. No teacher were support .food was very bad.

reviews.author: Chitra Bhatt
reviews.review_body: Very poor school few reviews are done by students itself only that too forcefully by there management. In terms of everything it is zero when it comes to girls security it is zero. There are so many goods schools in dehradun do not prefer this school

reviews.author: Swati __
reviews.review_body: Had a horrible experience. My child couldn't even stay there for 10 days. Apart from the picturesque scenery nothing is right. Surely, everything looks picture perfect to new commers and their parents at the time of admission however the reality can't be far from the truth. Students are not at all cordial and friendly towards new-commers. And these aren't the problem faced by my child alone but by many others. My child was extremely disheartened and depressed after join this school in just 10 days and when i brought this to the attention of the concerned faculty no measures were taken. Several lies were told at the time of admission. Keeping this comment short and crisp, i would just ask parents to do their due diligence before sending their beloved children to any school rather than seeing every thing from rose-tinted glasses that the school offers initially.

reviews.author: Shopping Sircar
reviews.review_body: Excellent school for girls with individual attention and good academics.

reviews.review_body: Good staff good students best education ...
